content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Find missing number". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: n is the length of the input array
content.outputFormat: The missing number in the sequence

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Mathematical calculation of the sum of an arithmetic series

code.Python3:
def find_missing_number(nums):
            n = len(nums) + 1
            expected_sum = (n * (n + 1)) // 2
            actual_sum = sum(nums)
            return expected_sum - actual_sum
